Game.Name: Masters - Harukanaru Augusta 2 (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Masters: Harukanaru Augusta 2 is a golf game from T&E Soft and the sequel to their 1991 game Harukanaru Augusta. The Augusta of the title refers to the famous Augusta National Golf Club in Augusta, Georgia, which is the setting for The Masters tournament each year. For this game, the player is a participant in the 1993 Masters competition.The game was followed by another sequel focused on the Masters competition, Masters New: Harukanaru Augusta 3.
